{{Item
| image = Empty locator orb.png
| id = empty_locator_orb
| type = Utilities
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Empty Locator Orb''' is a material used to craft the [[Locator Orbs]].

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| White Carpet <br>+ [[Radio Collar]]<br>+ String<br>+ Glass Block
|[[File:Empty locator orb crafting.png]]
|}

== Used in ==
* [[Locator Orbs]]

== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.16.0.
* The item is a direct reference to '''The Satomi Power Orbs''' from the game '''OKAMI''' <ref>https://okami.fandom.com/wiki/Canine_Warriors</ref>

<references />
